sqlReaderQuery.value: @concat('SELECT [delivery_group_id], [source_system], [business_unit_name], [ledger_id], [header_row_count], [line_row_count] FROM [dbo].[tbl_integration_delivery_group] WHERE [batch_id] = TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, ''') AND [group_status] IN (''Ready'',''Retry Ready'') ORDER BY [delivery_group_id]')

text.value: @concat('UPDATE [dbo].[tbl_integration_delivery_group] SET [group_status] = ''Running'', [started_at_utc] = SYSUTCDATETIME(), [updated_at_utc] = SYSUTCDATETIME() WHERE [delivery_group_id] = ', string(item().delivery_group_id), '; UPDATE [dbo].[tbl_integration_document_status] SET [document_status] = ''Submitting To Fusion'', [last_updated_at_utc] = SYSUTCDATETIME() WHERE [delivery_group_id] = ', string(item().delivery_group_id), ' AND [document_status] = ''Ready For Delivery'';')

sqlReaderQuery.value: @concat('SELECT [Invoice ID],[Business Unit],[Source],[Invoice Number],[Invoice Amount],[Invoice Date],[Supplier Name],[Supplier Number],[Supplier Site],[Invoice Currency],[Payment Currency],[Description],[Import Set],[Invoice Type],[Legal Entity],[Customer Tax Registration Number],[Customer Registration Code],[First-Party Tax Registration Number],[Supplier Tax Registration Code],[Payment Terms],[Terms Date],[Goods Received Date],[Invoice Received Date],[Accounting Date],[Payment Method],[Pay Group],[Pay Alone],[Discountable Amount],[Prepayment Number],[Prepayment Line Number],[Prepayment Application Amount],[Prepayment Accounting Date],[Invoice Includes Prepayment],[Conversion Rate Type],[Conversion Date],[Conversion Rate],[Liability Combination],[Document Category Code],[Voucher Number],[Requester First Name],[Requester Last Name],[Requester Employee Number],[Delivery Channel Code],[Bank Charge Bearer],[Remit-to Supplier],[Remit-to Supplier Number],[Remit-to Address Name],[Payment Priority],[Settlement Priority],[Unique Remittance Identifier],[Unique Remittance Identifier Check Digit],[Payment Reason Code],[Payment Reason Comments],[Remittance Message 1],[Remittance Message 2],[Remittance Message 3],[Withholding Tax Group],[Ship-to Location],[Taxation Country],[Document Sub Type],[Tax Invoice Internal Sequence Number],[Supplier Tax Invoice Number],[Tax Invoice Recording Date],[Supplier Tax Invoice Date],[Supplier Tax Invoice Conversion Rate],[Port Of Entry Code],[Correction Year],[Correction Period],[Import Document Number],[Import Document Date],[Tax Control Amount],[Calculate Tax During Import],[Add Tax To Invoice Amount],[Attribute Category],[Attribute 1],[Attribute 2],[Attribute 3],[Attribute 4],[Attribute 5],[Attribute 6],[Attribute 7],[Attribute 8],[Attribute 9],[Attribute 10],[Attribute 11],[Attribute 12],[Attribute 13],[Attribute 14],[Attribute 5],[Global Attribute Category],[Global Attribute 1],[Global Attribute 2],[Global Attribute 3],[Global Attribute 4],[Global Attribute 5],[Global Attribute 6],[Global Attribute 7],[Global Attribute 8],[Global Attribute 9],[Global Attribute 10],[Global Attribute 11],[Global Attribute 12],[Global Attribute 13],[Global Attribute 14],[Global Attribute 15],[Global Attribute 16],[Global Attribute 17],[Global Attribute 18],[Global Attribute 19],[Global Attribute 20],[Global Attribute Number 1],[Global Attribute Number 2],[Global Attribute Number 3],[Global Attribute Number 4],[Global Attribute Number 5],[Global Attribute Date 1],[Global Attribute Date 2],[Global Attribute Date 3],[Global Attribute Date 4],[Global Attribute Date 5],[URL Attachments],''END'' AS ENDROW FROM [dbo].[tbl_generic_ap_invoice_header_staging] WHERE [batchId] = TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, ''') AND [delivery_group_id] = ', string(item().delivery_group_id), ' AND ISNULL([processed_bit], 0) = 0 AND [ValidationStatus] = ''Validation Success''')

@concat('SELECT [Invoice ID],[Line Number],[Line Type],[Amount],[Invoice Quantity],[Unit Price],[UOM],[Description],[PO Number],[PO Line Number],[PO Schedule Number],[PO Distribution Number],[Item Location],[Location of Final Discharge],[Transaction Business Category],[Product Fiscal Classification],[Intended Use],[User-Defined Fiscal Classification],[Product Type],[Assessable Value],[Product Across All Item Lines],[Line Group Number],[Cost Factor Name],[Statistical Quantity],[Track as Asset],[Asset Book Type Code],[Asset Category ID],[Serial Number],[Manufacturer],[Model Number],[Warranty 13],[Attribute 14],[Attribute 15],[Attribute Number 1],[Attribute Number 2],[Attribute Number 3],[Attribute Number 4],[Attribute Number 5],[Attribute Date 1],[Attribute Date 2],[Attribute Date 3],[Attribute Date 4],[Attribute Date 5],[Global Attribute Category],[Global Attribute 1],[Global Attribute 2],[Global Attribute 3],[Global Attribute 4],[Global Attribute 5],[Global Attribute 6],[Global Attribute 7],[Global Attribute 8],[Global Attribute 9],[Global Attribute 10],[Global Attribute 11],[Global Attribute 12],[Global Attribute 13],[Global Attribute 14],[Global Attribute 15],[Global Attribute 16],[Global Attribute 17],[Global Attribute 18],[Global Attribute 19],[Global Attribute 20],[Global Attribute Number 1],[Global Attribute Number 2],[Global Attribute Number 3],[Global Attribute Number 4],[Global Attribute Number 5],[Global Attribute Date 1],[Global Attribute Date 2],[Global Attribute Date 3],[Global Attribute Date 4],[Global Attribute Date 5],[Project ID],[Task ID],[Expenditure Type ID],[Expenditure Item Date],[Expenditure Organization ID],[Project Number],[Task Number],[Expenditure Type],[Expenditure Organization],[Funding Source Id],[PJC Reserved Attribute 2],[PJC Reserved Attribute 3],[PJC Reserved Attribute 4],[PJC Reserved Attribute 5],[PJC Reserved Attribute 6],[PJC Reserved Attribute 7],[PJC Reserved Attribute 8],[PJC Reserved Attribute 9],[PJC Reserved Attribute 10],[PJC User Defined Attribute 1],[PJC User Defined Attribute 2],[PJC User Defined Attribute 3],[PJC User Defined Attribute 4],[PJC User Defined Attribute 5],[PJC User Defined Attribute 6],[PJC User Defined Attribute 7],[PJC User Defined Attribute 8],[PJC User Defined Attribute 9],[PJC User Defined Attribute 10],[Fiscal Charge Type],[Multiperiod Accounting Start Date],[Multiperiod Accounting End Date],[Multiperiod Accounting Accrual Account],[Project Name],[Task Name],[Work Type],[Contract Name],[Contract Number],[Funding Source Name],[Funding Source Number],[Requester Email Address],[RCV Transaction Id],''END'' AS ENDROW FROM [dbo].[tbl_generic_ap_invoice_lines_staging] WHERE [batchId] = TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, ''') AND [delivery_group_id] = ', string(item().delivery_group_id), ' AND ISNULL([processed_bit], 0) = 0 AND [ValidationStatus] = ''Validation Success''')

text.value: @concat('IF LOWER(''', replace(string(activity('Load to Interface table').output.pipelineReturnValue.final_status), '''', ''''''), ''') IN (''succeeded'',''success'',''completed'') BEGIN SELECT 1; END ELSE BEGIN THROW 51000, ''Interface loader ESS job returned a non-success status.'', 1; END')

@concat('IF LOWER(''', replace(string(activity('Load data to AP table').output.pipelineReturnValue.final_status), '''', ''''''), ''') IN (''succeeded'',''success'',''completed'') BEGIN SELECT 1; END ELSE BEGIN THROW 51001, ''AP import ESS job returned a non-success status.'', 1; END')

@concat('UPDATE [dbo].[tbl_integration_delivery_group] SET [group_status] = ''Completed'', [ucm_document_id] = ''', replace(string(activity('upload_to_ucm').output.pipelineReturnValue.document_id), '''', ''''''), ''', [ucm_file_name] = ''', replace(concat(pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, '_', string(item().delivery_group_id), '.zip'), '''', ''''''), ''', [interface_request_id] = ''', replace(string(activity('Load to Interface table').output.pipelineReturnValue.process_id), '''', ''''''), ''', [interface_final_status] = ''', replace(string(activity('Load to Interface table').output.pipelineReturnValue.final_status), '''', ''''''), ''', [import_request_id] = ''', replace(string(activity('Load data to AP table').output.pipelineReturnValue.process_id), '''', ''''''), ''', [import_final_status] = ''', replace(string(activity('Load data to AP table').output.pipelineReturnValue.final_status), '''', ''''''), ''', [completed_at_utc] = SYSUTCDATETIME(), [updated_at_utc] = SYSUTCDATETIME() WHERE [delivery_group_id] = ', string(item().delivery_group_id), '; INSERT INTO [dbo].[tbl_integration_ess_request] ([batch_id],[delivery_group_id],[request_stage],[request_id],[job_definition_name],[ledger_id],[request_status],[response_payload],[created_at_utc],[updated_at_utc]) VALUES (TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, '''), ', string(item().delivery_group_id), ', ''InterfaceLoader'', ''', replace(string(activity('Load to Interface table').output.pipelineReturnValue.process_id), '''', ''''''), ''', ''InterfaceLoaderController'', ', string(item().ledger_id), ', ''', replace(string(activity('Load to Interface table').output.pipelineReturnValue.final_status), '''', ''''''), ''', ''', replace(string(activity('Load to Interface table').output.pipelineReturnValue), '''', ''''''), ''', SYSUTCDATETIME(), SYSUTCDATETIME()); INSERT INTO [dbo].[tbl_integration_ess_request] ([batch_id],[delivery_group_id],[request_stage],[request_id],[job_definition_name],[ledger_id],[request_status],[response_payload],[created_at_utc],[updated_at_utc]) VALUES (TRY_CONVERT(uniqueidentifier, ''', pipeline().parameters.p_batch_id, '''), ', string(item().delivery_group_id), ', ''APImport'', ''', replace(string(activity('Load data to AP table').output.pipelineReturnValue.process_id), '''', ''''''), ''', ''APXIIMPT'', ', string(item().ledger_id), ', ''', replace(string(activity('Load data to AP table').output.pipelineReturnValue.final_status), '''', ''''''), ''', ''', replace(string(activity('Load data to AP table').output.pipelineReturnValue), '''', ''''''), ''', SYSUTCDATETIME(), SYSUTCDATETIME()); UPDATE [dbo].[tbl_generic_ap_invoice_lines_staging] SET [processed_bit] = 1, [processed_at] = SYSUTCDATETIME(), [invoice_status] = ''Imported To AP'' WHERE [delivery_group_id] = ', string(item().delivery_group_id), ' AND ISNULL([processed_bit], 0) = 0 AND [ValidationStatus] = ''Validation Success''; UPDATE [dbo].[tbl_generic_ap_invoice_header_staging] SET [processed_bit] = 1, [processed_at] = SYSUTCDATETIME(), [invoice_status] = ''Imported To AP'' WHERE [delivery_group_id] = ', string(item().delivery_group_id), ' AND ISNULL([processed_bit], 0) = 0 AND [ValidationStatus] = ''Validation Success''; UPDATE [dbo].[tbl_integration_document_status] SET [delivery_group_id] = ', string(item().delivery_group_id), ', [ledger_id] = ', string(item().ledger_id), ', [interface_request_id] = ''', replace(string(activity('Load to Interface table').output.pipelineReturnValue.process_id), '''', ''''''), ''', [import_request_id] = ''', replace(string(activity('Load data to AP table').output.pipelineReturnValue.process_id), '''', ''''''), ''', [document_status] = ''Imported To AP'', [status_message] = ''Delivered to Fusion AP import successfully.'', [last_updated_at_utc] = SYSUTCDATETIME() WHERE [delivery_group_id] = ', string(item().delivery_group_id), ';')

folder.name: df_softco_to_fusion_ap_invoice_inbound_integration (IN-04)/stage 2 - to be triggered every X hours
